facts.primaryTitle: Something Was Watching From the Bedroom Window
facts.setting: Paul's bedroom was on the second floor.
criticalEvents: Paul's bedroom was on the second floor.
There was no balcony, no tree and no ladder.
Yet every night, something tapped on the glass.
Paul Mercer was a freelance editor caring for his injured brother when the story began in a remote farmhouse bordered by winter fields.
facts.threat: Paul's bedroom was on the second floor.
facts.primaryReveal: It did prove that the official account left out something important.
facts.finalConsequence: It did prove that the official account left out something important.
